title: selaginella ovifolia
intro: Selaginella ovifolia, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella ovifolia include reducing inflammation and pain, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
